name: Lead Capture
description: A focused lead-gen landing page for a free guide or webinar: a strong value-prop hero, three sign-up benefits, a working email-capture form wired to the data API, and a footer.
prompt: Build a focused lead-capture landing page for a free <guide or webinar>: a hero with a strong value proposition and a call to action, three benefit cards explaining why to sign up, a working email-capture form that POSTs to the leads collection and shows a thank-you, and a footer.
